# Part 29 — Miscellaneous

## PART 29 E+W MISCELLANEOUS


### Personal details E+W


29.1. —(1) Unless the court directs otherwise, a party is not required to reveal [ F1 to anyone other than the court ] —


(2) Where a party does not wish to reveal any of the particulars in paragraph (1), that party must give notice of those particulars to the court and the particulars will not be revealed to any person unless the court directs otherwise.


(3) Where a party changes home address during the course of proceedings, that party must give notice of the change to the court.


Textual Amendments


F1 Words in rule 29.1(1) inserted (1.6.2026) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2025 (S.I. 2025/1242) , rules 1(3)(c) , 4(a)


F2 Words in rule 29.1(1)(a) substituted (1.6.2026) by The Family Procedure (Amendment) Rules 2025 (S.I. 2025/1242) , rules 1(3)(c) , 4(b)


### Disclosure of information under the 1991 Act E+W


29.2. Where the [ F3 Secretary of State ] requires a person mentioned in regulation 3(1), 4(2) or 6(2)(a) of the Child Support Information Regulations 2008 M1 to furnish information or evidence for a purpose mentioned in regulation 4(1) of those Regulations, nothing in these rules will—


Textual Amendments


F3 Words in rule 29.2 substituted (1.8.2012) by The Public Bodies (Child Maintenance and Enforcement Commission: Abolition and Transfer of Functions) Order 2012 (S.I. 2012/2007) , art. 1(2) , Sch. para. 125(c)


Marginal Citations


M1 S.I. 2008/2551 .


### Method of giving notice E+W


29.3. —(1) Unless directed otherwise, a notice which is required by these rules to be given to a person must be given—
